When the car starts the head lights run through a series of motion checks, they go left, right down and then back up.  We run into an issue every few weeks where the headlights stay in the down position.  This happened with our car and a loaner we received from the dealership. I

narrative.headline: What 2023 Lincoln Navigator owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 6 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (67% of reports).
